QW-190  OTHER TESTS AND EXAMINATIONS. (a) When applicable, additional tests such as hardness testing or volumetric examination may be required for procedure qualification by the referencing Code. (b) Radiographic examination may be used as an alternative to mechanical testing for performance qualification, if permitted by this paragraph. (c) Additional tests do not replace the tension and bend tests required by QW-150, except as permitted by this paragraph for specific conditions. See also QW-170 for notch-toughness tests. Test specimens shall comply with QW-452. For procedure qualification tests, refer to QW-160.
